name: laser-welding-skills
description: Industrial laser welding process engineering skills: material assessment, hardware selection, DOE, defect diagnosis, motion programs, fieldbus mapping, and PLC/C# code generation.

author.name: 文享(上海)智能科技有限公司

interface.shortDescription: Laser welding process engineering, DOE, automation, and code generation
interface.longDescription: Use Laser Welding Skills to assess weldability, choose laser and optics hardware, build DOE matrices, diagnose defects, generate trajectories, map fieldbus signals, and generate CODESYS ST or C# laser-control code.
defaultPrompt: Help me design a laser welding process window.
Diagnose this laser welding defect and propose DOE next steps.
Generate a CODESYS laser control function block.
